creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
The FrontPage port has been updated to use Apache v1.26.  The port is
available from:

http://www.westbend.net/~hetzels/apache-fp/

a copy has also been placed at:


ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/apache-fp.126.tgz

This port provides an easy to set up apache web server w/frontpage module
(a.k.a. apache-fp) and FrontPage Extensions.

Changes:

Please remove old port ( apache-fp.port.125.f.tgz ) from the server.

Thanks,

Scot
